subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Blessed is thy father, for verily he was with Me in most days and bore witness unto that which God Himself hath testified: that there is no God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد طوبی لابیک انه کان معی فی اکثر الایام و شهد بما شهد الله انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for nearness to God, @eulogies; reminiscences
